name: Guacamole
snippet: If you don’t already know this about me, I have a love affair with avocados.  I’ll take them any way I can get them!  Straight up with a little salt and pepper, sliced or diced on salads, on tacos, in dressings, and my all time favorite, Guacamole! In my opinion, Chipotle makes the best guacamole but mine is a close second ;) .  This is my basic, fail proof, easy, go to recipe that never disappoints.  It’s good as is but feel free to jazz it up with some of the variations listed below.  Give it a try and let me know what you think.
